landing.description: A Cloudflare-native dashboard template. Public pages live here; the dashboard is protected behind Clerk authentication.

drawer.title: Theme Settings
drawer.description: Adjust the appearance and layout to suit your preferences.
drawer.resetAll: Reset all settings to default values

theme.description: Choose between system preference, light mode, or dark mode

sidebarStyle.description: Choose between inset, floating, or standard sidebar layout

layout.description: Choose between default expanded, compact icon-only, or full layout mode

direction.description: Choose between left-to-right or right-to-left site direction

bulk.announcement: {{count}} {{entity}} selected. Bulk actions toolbar is available.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account settings and set e-mail preferences.

common.loadErrorDesc: Check your connection and try again.

profile.title: Profile
profile.desc: This is how others will see you on the site.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.desc: Customize the appearance of the app. Automatically switch between day and night themes.
appearance.fontDesc: Set the font you want to use in the dashboard.
appearance.themeDesc: Select the theme for the dashboard.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.communicationDesc: Receive emails about your account activity.
notifications.marketingDesc: Receive emails about new products, features, and more.
notifications.socialDesc: Receive emails for friend requests, follows, and more.
notifications.securityDesc: Receive emails about your account activity and security.
notifications.mobileLabel: Use different settings for my mobile devices
notifications.mobileDescPrefix: You can manage your mobile notifications in the

display.title: Display
display.desc: Turn items on or off to control what's displayed in the app.
display.sidebarDesc: Select the items you want to display in the sidebar.
display.minOne: You have to select at least one item.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Here's a list of your tasks for this month!

drawer.updateDesc: Update the task by providing necessary info.
drawer.createDesc: Add a new task by providing necessary info.

import.title: Import Tasks
import.desc: Import tasks quickly from a CSV file.
import.importedFile: You have imported the following file:

delete.title: Delete this task: {{id}} ?
delete.descPrefix: You are about to delete a task with the ID
delete.deleted: The following task has been deleted:

multiDelete.title: Delete {{count}} tasks
multiDelete.areYouSure: Are you sure you want to delete the selected tasks?
multiDelete.warningDesc: Please be careful, this operation can not be rolled back.

users.title: User List
users.subtitle: The users in this Clerk instance, with their status and role.
users.loadErrorDescSuffix: request failed. Confirm the Clerk secret key is configured, then refresh.

content.title: Content
content.subtitle: Published posts from the CMS, read-only. Editing lives in the CMS admin.

notConfigured.title: Connect your CMS
notConfigured.body1b: is set, so there is no CMS to read posts from yet. Point it at your SonicJS CMS Worker origin (for example
notConfigured.body2b: for the full setup and CORS checklist.

error.title: Couldn't reach the CMS
error.descA: The request to the CMS failed. It may be down, or its
error.descB: may not include this dashboard's origin. Check

detail.errorDesc: The request for this post failed. The CMS may be down or unreachable from this origin.

public.errorBody: Something went wrong loading the blog. Please try again.
public.notFoundBody: This post may have been moved or unpublished.

apps.title: App Integrations
apps.subtitle: Here's a list of your apps for the integration!

desc.telegram: Connect with Telegram for real-time communication.
desc.notion: Effortlessly sync Notion pages for seamless collaboration.
desc.figma: View and collaborate on Figma designs in one place.
desc.trello: Sync Trello cards for streamlined project management.
desc.slack: Integrate Slack for efficient team communication
desc.zoom: Host Zoom meetings directly from the dashboard.
desc.stripe: Easily manage Stripe transactions and payments.
desc.gmail: Access and manage Gmail messages effortlessly.
desc.medium: Explore and share Medium stories on your dashboard.
desc.docker: Effortlessly manage Docker containers on your dashboard.
desc.github: Streamline code management with GitHub integration.
desc.gitlab: Efficiently manage code projects with GitLab integration.
desc.discord: Connect with Discord for seamless team communication.
desc.whatsapp: Easily integrate WhatsApp for direct messaging.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.trendDesc: Desktop vs. mobile sessions over the week.
dashboard.comparisonDesc: Revenue, profit, and expenses month over month.

items.title: Items

empty.title: No items yet
empty.body: Create your first item to get started.

items.loadErrorDesc: Check your connection and refresh the page.

form.saveFailedDesc: Could not save the item. Try again.

delete.title: Delete item?
delete.desc: This action cannot be undone. "{{name}}" will be permanently deleted.
delete.failed: Failed to delete item. Try again.

chats.emptyBody: Send a message to start a chat.

forbidden.title: Access Forbidden
forbidden.body: You don't have necessary permission to view this resource.

serverError.title: Oops! Something went wrong :')
serverError.body: We apologize for the inconvenience. Please try again later.

maintenance.title: Website is under maintenance!
maintenance.body: The site is not available at the moment. We'll be back online shortly.

notFound.title: Oops! Page Not Found!
notFound.body: It seems like the page you're looking for does not exist or might have been removed.

unauthorized.title: Unauthorized Access
unauthorized.body: Please log in with the appropriate credentials to access this resource.
